title: ricinocarpus exaltatus
intro: Ricinocarpus exaltatus, also known as the 'tall ricinocarp', is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus exaltatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
